name: Chrome
careInstructions: Clean with a soft damp cloth and mild soap. Dry immediately to prevent water spots. Avoid abrasive cleaners or scouring pads.

name: Brushed Nickel
careInstructions: Wipe with a soft cloth and warm water. For stubborn marks, use a mild non-abrasive cleaner. The brushed texture naturally resists fingerprints.

name: Matte Black
careInstructions: Clean with a soft damp cloth only. Avoid acidic or abrasive cleaners. PVD coating is durable but can be scratched by harsh chemicals.

name: Brushed Gold
careInstructions: Gently wipe with a soft damp cloth. Avoid vinegar, bleach, and abrasive pads. PVD coating provides fingerprint resistance and long-lasting lustre.

name: Coffee Gold
careInstructions: Clean with a soft cloth and warm water. Avoid harsh chemicals and abrasive materials. PVD coating ensures durability and colour retention.

name: Metal Gun
careInstructions: Wipe with a soft damp cloth. Avoid acidic cleaners and abrasive pads. The PVD gunmetal coating is scratch-resistant under normal use.
